since_last: 28% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.12%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -0.10% · Gold -1.08% · Nasdaq100 -0.88%. 28% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.12%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.12%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -8.27%
cards.body: Leaders: ISRG +3.34%, BIDU +3.18%, AVAV +2.43%, ZBRA +2.26%, OKTA +2.14%. Laggards: SKHY -8.27%, CEVA -7.58%, SMR -7.48%, OKLO -7.43%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.53% at $134.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.53% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
